report.summary: Second standup Apr 2: 4 new learn pages since last standup (26 total, +4), 2 full agent cycles completed today. Build produced PayFi + Yield Farming guides; design polished all 4 new pages + created 2 OG images. P0 blocker persists: Day 8+ without deploy, 61 uncommitted files. 630 published slugs, 2 pages in publish queue.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE LAST STANDUP (00:09 UTC): 4 new learn pages detected — PayFi Crypto Payments (+1), Yield Farming DeFi Strategies (+1), Data Availability Modular Blockchains (+1), Crypto Lending Borrowing DeFi (+1). Total: 22 → 26 learn guides on disk.
CONTENT VOLUME: 18,560 lines across 26 learn page.tsx files (up from 15,113 — +3,447 lines, +22.8% growth in ~2 hours).
PUBLISHED SLUGS: 630 (+2 from yesterday's 628). 2 additional pages in PUBLISH_QUEUE (Euler V2, Hyperlane) verified and ready for promotion.
OG IMAGE COVERAGE: 26 total OG SVGs (2 new: PayFi payments, Yield Farming). Design agent audited all 4 new pages, fixed OG extension mismatches and breadcrumb gaps.
SEO PIPELINE: All 4 new pages have Article + FAQPage structured data, internal linking, and keyword-optimized titles. No GSC or Vercel Analytics accessible from sandbox.
API HEALTH: All 6 API routes code-healthy with proper cache-control headers (confirmed by EOD-v2 audit). No code changes to API routes this cycle.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE ACTIVITY: 10 agent reports today across both workspaces (2 cryptodegen + 8 Degen0x). Agents that ran: standup×2, build×3, design×1, community×2, eod×2. Full production cadence.

COMPLETED SINCE LAST STANDUP: (1) Build-v2 created PayFi + Yield Farming guides with full SEO. (2) Design agent audited all 4 new pages, created 2 OG images, fixed 5 UX bugs. (3) Community-v2 ran engagement cycle. (4) EOD-v2 completed full QA audit — 630 slugs, 6/6 API routes healthy, 141 TS errors stable.
P0 BLOCKER (Day 8+, PERSISTENT): No production deploy since commit 3b2dd28. 61 uncommitted files accumulating. All work since last push is local-only. Requires Jefe to authorize commit+push.
P1 — MISSING SCAFFOLDS: 109 published slugs still lack page.tsx files (17% gap). Unchanged since yesterday.
P2 — PUBLISH QUEUE: 2 pages ready (Euler V2, Hyperlane). Both QA-verified with valid Metadata exports. Blocked on deploy.
P3 — SOCIAL CONTENT: 0 community draft JSONs in workspace. Community agent running but outputs not persisting to expected location.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — DEPLOY AUTHORIZATION (P0, CRITICAL): Day 8+ without production push. 61 uncommitted files, 26 learn guides, 2 queued pages, 6 new OG images — all stuck locally. This is the single highest-leverage action: one commit+push unlocks all accumulated work. Recommend: next time Jefe is online, batch commit everything and push to trigger Vercel deploy.

PRIORITY 2 — CONTINUE BUILD CADENCE: Content pipeline is healthy — 4 new pages in ~2 hours. Next build cycle should target the 109 missing page.tsx scaffolds (prioritize high-traffic slugs). Also scaffold any remaining learn topics from the editorial calendar.

PRIORITY 3 — QUALITY GATE BEFORE DEPLOY: When deploy unblocks, run full QA pass: verify all 26 learn pages build clean, confirm 2 publish queue pages promote correctly, validate OG images render at correct dimensions. The 141 TS errors are non-blocking (ignoreBuildErrors=true) but should be triaged post-deploy.

metrics.label: 💰 Actual Cost — Today's Sprint
metrics.value: $979 (standup×2=$90, build×3=$699, design×1=$60, community×2=$82, eod×2=$126) — 10 total runs

report.email: Chrome JS fetch to Resend API blocked (CORS/network restriction from browser context) — consistent with all previous cycles
